triage.decision: Which architectural style should the system adopt: single-deployment monolith, modular monolith with enforced internal module boundaries, or some other single-server style?
triage.blast_rationale: Pre-draw, cross-box: style determines what top-level components exist and how they relate; no box can be drawn in the HLD until style is set.
triage.route_rationale: Foundational + in-cut (FD1 needed_by S1); resolve now in foundation pass.

triage.decision: Which server-side language, runtime, and web framework should be used to implement the application?
triage.blast_rationale: Pre-draw, cross-box: every slice builds on the chosen runtime and framework; stack must be set before any component can be constructed.
triage.route_rationale: Foundational + in-cut (FD1 needed_by S1); resolve now in foundation pass.

triage.decision: Which server-side library or tool should generate the PDF invoice file?
triage.blast_rationale: Inside one box: PDF generation library is an implementation detail of the invoice export component (S3); does not constrain any other HLD component.
triage.route_rationale: Local; routes to Phase 3 deferred-decision queue for resolution while drawing S3.

triage.decision: Which datastore paradigm and technology should be used to persist all application state (freelancer identity, projects, time entries, invoices)?
triage.blast_rationale: Pre-draw, cross-box: persistence choice determines schema strategy and data-access layer shared by every slice; no slice can be designed until datastore is chosen.
triage.route_rationale: Foundational + in-cut (FD3 needed_by S1); resolve now in foundation pass.

triage.decision: How should the application's internal modules be cut: by horizontal layer (controllers/services/repositories), by vertical feature slice, or by domain boundary?
triage.blast_rationale: Pre-draw, cross-box: boundary strategy determines which components appear in the HLD and how they interact; must be settled before boxes are drawn.
triage.route_rationale: Foundational but not-yet: cut did not name it as an FD; skeleton seams (ingress, domain, persistence, primary_external_integration) do not require module-cut strategy to be established; earliest post-skeleton slice S4 forces the question.

triage.decision: How should the application's HTTP surface be shaped: a server-rendered multi-page application, a REST/JSON API backend consumed by a single-page frontend, or a hybrid approach?
triage.blast_rationale: Pre-draw, cross-box: HTTP surface shape determines whether a separate frontend component exists alongside the backend; HLD component count and interaction model depend on this choice.
triage.route_rationale: Foundational + in-cut (FD1 needed_by S1); resolve now in foundation pass.

triage.decision: Which OAuth provider type or set of providers should the system support for freelancer authentication?
triage.blast_rationale: Pre-draw: provider type determines integration seam's redirect URIs, token shape, and callback contract before the skeleton's primary_external_integration seam can be designed.
triage.route_rationale: Foundational + in-cut (FD2 needed_by S1); resolve now in foundation pass.

triage.decision: Which OAuth integration library or mechanism should handle the OAuth handshake, token exchange, and session establishment within the application?
triage.blast_rationale: Inside one box: OAuth library choice is an implementation detail within the authentication component; does not alter HLD structure once provider type is decided.
triage.route_rationale: Local; routes to Phase 3 deferred-decision queue for resolution while drawing the authentication component.

triage.decision: How should application secrets and configuration (OAuth credentials, database connection strings, hosting environment values) be injected into the running application?
triage.blast_rationale: Inside the deployment envelope: config/secrets injection is a deployment-time configuration detail within the hosting environment; does not determine what HLD components exist or how boundaries are cut.
triage.route_rationale: Local; routes to Phase 3 deferred-decision queue for resolution while drawing the deployment/hosting component.

triage.decision: Which hosting and deployment target category should be used to serve the application: a PaaS platform, a VPS, a container platform, or another managed runtime?
triage.blast_rationale: Pre-draw, cross-box: deployment target determines runtime environment, build pipeline shape, and environment-variable strategy that every slice must conform to.
triage.route_rationale: Foundational + in-cut (FD4 needed_by S1); resolve now in foundation pass.

triage.decision: What build and test strategy should be used to mechanically prove each acceptance criterion is met: unit and integration tests, end-to-end browser automation, or a mixed approach?
triage.blast_rationale: Inside the build pipeline: test strategy determines how CI is shaped but does not determine what HLD components exist or how they are cut.
triage.route_rationale: Local; routes to Phase 3 deferred-decision queue for resolution while building out the CI/build pipeline.
